prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 ultra-detailed anime fantasy gacha character card showing an SSR rarity summon. The main subject is a glamorous adult female battle-maid sorceress standing full-body in a confident front-facing pose on a glowing golden magic circle inside a dark cathedral-like treasure hall. She has long flowing dark brown hair, violet eyes, a soft confident smile, and a frilly white maid headband with black ribbon ornaments. Her outfit is an ornate black, white, and gold fantasy maid armor dress: low-cut white bodice, black corset with gold lacing, puffed white ruffles, short layered skirt, translucent trailing overskirt, detached black sleeves with white cuffs, gold filigree armor accents, thigh straps, black thigh-high stockings, and high-heeled armored boots. She holds a tall elaborate magical spear or staff in her right hand, made of black and gold metal with sharp spearhead shapes and glowing purple crystal energy. Surround her with floating prismatic crystal shards, rainbow lens flares, sparkling starbursts, and intense golden summon light beams from behind and below. Add an ornate collectible-card frame in polished gold with curling baroque corners and gem accents. Include exactly 2 major UI text/rating elements: a huge iridescent gold SSR label in the upper left with jewel shine, and exactly 6 gold stars aligned across the upper right. Add one empty black-and-gold nameplate at the bottom center with a small pink gem, but no readable name. Use a luxurious high-rarity mobile RPG card illustration style, dramatic backlighting, saturated gold highlights, crisp line art, painterly anime rendering, intricate details, symmetrical composition, and premium holographic effects. Avoid extra text, watermarks, logos, cropped feet, duplicate limbs, or additional characters.
